title: DummyConnectorOptions
description: Constructor options for DummyConnector — local mock connector used in dev/tests. Source: packages/connector-dummy/src/DummyConnector.ts.

name.description: Override the connector identifier (lets you register multiple dummies).

replyDelay.description: Milliseconds before the echo reply is returned after a message is sent.

connectDelay.description: Milliseconds to wait before connect() resolves — simulates a real handshake.
